data.value: This inventory shows what is actually configurable today. It does not pretend a reusable template engine exists where only hard-coded transactional composition exists.

data.name: CommunicationCapabilityCoverageNote
data.value: This matrix is intentionally operational, not aspirational. It shows what operators can already inspect today and where Communication Core work is still missing.

data.name: CommunicationBuiltInFlowInvitationNextStep
data.value: Move to Communication Core template + delivery log

data.name: CommunicationBuiltInFlowActivationNextStep
data.value: Move to template engine + confirmation analytics/logging

data.name: CommunicationBuiltInFlowPasswordResetTrigger
data.value: Forgot password or admin reset support

data.name: CommunicationBuiltInFlowPasswordResetNextStep
data.value: Move to template engine + delivery/audit visibility

data.name: CommunicationBuiltInFlowPhoneVerificationDeliveryPath
data.value: Twilio SMS or WhatsApp Cloud API via provider-backed senders

data.name: CommunicationBuiltInFlowPhoneVerificationStatus
data.value: Live, token-based mobile verification with customizable text templates

data.name: CommunicationBuiltInFlowPhoneVerificationNextStep
data.value: Extend into richer delivery history and channel policy analytics

data.name: CommunicationBuiltInFlowAdminTestDeliveryPath
data.value: Configured channel transport to operator test targets only

data.name: CommunicationBuiltInFlowAdminTestStatus
data.value: Live, operator-safe diagnostic actions for configured channels

data.name: CommunicationBuiltInFlowAdminTestNextStep
data.value: Later fold into Communication Core test/delivery diagnostics

data.name: CommunicationBuiltInFlowAdminAlertsDeliveryPath
data.value: Configuration exists, full flow not yet centralized

data.name: CommunicationBuiltInFlowAdminAlertsStatus
data.value: Partially configured, not a complete Communication Core workflow

data.name: CommunicationBuiltInFlowTestTargetsDeliveryPath
data.value: Provider-backed test send actions from Business Communications

data.name: CommunicationBuiltInFlowTestTargetsStatus
data.value: Live, operator-safe transport validation with configured test recipients

data.name: CommunicationBuiltInFlowTestTargetsNextStep
data.value: Extend from transport validation into richer multi-channel delivery history

data.name: CommunicationCapabilityTemplateEngineState
data.value: Not implemented as a reusable platform capability

data.name: CommunicationCapabilityTemplateEngineVisibility
data.value: Workspace and business profile now show configured subject/body previews, supported tokens, and direct policy handoffs

data.name: CommunicationCapabilityTemplateEngineNextStep
data.value: Move invitation, activation, and password reset into Communication Core templates

data.name: CommunicationCapabilityDeliveryLoggingState
data.value: Phase-1 SMTP audit rows exist with flow and optional business correlation

data.name: CommunicationCapabilityDeliveryLoggingVisibility
data.value: Dashboard preview and full email-audit screen are available

data.name: CommunicationCapabilityDeliveryLoggingNextStep
data.value: Expand into searchable multi-channel Communication Core delivery logs

data.name: CommunicationCapabilityRetryWorkflowState
data.value: Controlled generic retry now exists for invitation, activation, and password-reset audit rows after safe target resolution

data.name: CommunicationCapabilityRetryWorkflowVisibility
data.value: Operators can retry supported live flows from the failed/stale audit queue and still fall back to flow-specific support surfaces

data.name: CommunicationCapabilityRetryWorkflowNextStep
data.value: Keep generic retry constrained to resolvable live flows until delivery logs and richer replay safeguards exist

data.name: CommunicationCapabilityBusinessPolicyVisibilityState
data.value: Branding, sender defaults, reply-to, and phase-1 communication toggles are stored on Business

data.name: CommunicationCapabilityBusinessPolicyVisibilityVisibility
data.value: Queue, detail, and setup screens now expose these policies

data.name: CommunicationCapabilityBusinessPolicyVisibilityNextStep
data.value: Split further into template policy, channel policy, and delivery visibility

data.name: CommunicationCapabilityChannelTestTargetsState
data.value: Email, SMS, and WhatsApp test recipients are now configurable in site settings

data.name: CommunicationCapabilityChannelTestTargetsVisibility
data.value: Workspace shows whether each channel has a safe test target before go-live validation

data.name: CommunicationCapabilityChannelTestTargetsNextStep
data.value: Keep expanding from transport tests into richer multi-channel delivery history

data.name: CommunicationChannelOpsEmailReadyState
data.value: Live transport and live transactional flows

data.name: CommunicationChannelOpsEmailLiveFlows
data.value: Business invitation, account activation, password reset, admin communication test

data.name: CommunicationChannelOpsEmailReadyActions
data.value: Send test email, review failed audits, controlled retry for supported live flows

data.name: CommunicationChannelOpsEmailNotReadyActions
data.value: Complete SMTP and test-inbox settings before relying on email follow-up

data.name: CommunicationChannelOpsEmailRiskBoundary
data.value: Do not treat the audit queue as a blind replay engine; only supported flows can retry safely.

data.name: CommunicationChannelOpsEmailNextStep
data.value: Move deeper into richer delivery-log and template CRUD.

data.name: CommunicationChannelOpsSmsReadyActions
data.value: Send test SMS and use canonical phone-verification flow

data.name: CommunicationChannelOpsSmsNotReadyActions
data.value: Finish provider credentials and test-recipient setup

data.name: CommunicationChannelOpsSmsFallbackRiskBoundary
data.value: SMS is not yet a generic notification bus; it is currently verification-first and may be used as fallback when {0} is unavailable.

data.name: CommunicationChannelOpsSmsStrictRiskBoundary
data.value: SMS is not yet a generic notification bus; live use is currently verification-first, not broad campaign or alert fan-out.

data.name: CommunicationChannelOpsSmsNextStep
data.value: Add broader delivery history and channel-policy visibility when multi-channel delivery logs deepen.

data.name: CommunicationChannelOpsWhatsAppReadyActions
data.value: Send test WhatsApp and use canonical phone-verification flow

data.name: CommunicationChannelOpsWhatsAppNotReadyActions
data.value: Finish WhatsApp Cloud API credentials and test-recipient setup

data.name: CommunicationChannelOpsWhatsAppFallbackRiskBoundary
data.value: WhatsApp is intentionally narrow today: safe verification and operator transport validation, with fallback allowed when {0} cannot be used.

data.name: CommunicationChannelOpsWhatsAppStrictRiskBoundary
data.value: WhatsApp is intentionally narrow today: safe verification and operator transport validation, not a generic alert/replay surface.

data.name: CommunicationChannelOpsWhatsAppNextStep
data.value: Expand into broader delivery telemetry only after message-policy and history depth are stronger.

data.name: CommunicationChannelTruthTitle
data.value: Channel truth and safe live actions

data.name: CommunicationChannelTruthNote
data.value: This table defines what is actually live per channel. It is here to stop operators from assuming WhatsApp is only future-facing or that SMS and WhatsApp are already a generic notification platform.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyNote
data.value: Operators should use only the safe entry points listed here. Failed audit rows are for triage visibility; they are not a generic replay button.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyInvitationSafeAction
data.value: Use controlled audit retry or the invitation workspace resend/revoke after SMTP readiness is green.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyInvitationRetryStatus
data.value: Supported from failed or pending audit rows when a current invitation can be resolved safely.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyInvitationEntryPoint
data.value: Business setup, invitations list, and email-audit queue.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyInvitationEscalation
data.value: If repeated resends fail after transport is ready, escalate as Communication Core/platform debt instead of repeating sends.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyActivationSafeAction
data.value: Prefer self-service resend; use controlled audit retry or admin activation support only where current policy allows.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyActivationRetryStatus
data.value: Supported from failed or pending audit rows after resolving the live user by recipient email.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyActivationEntryPoint
data.value: Users queue, business members queue, and email-audit queue.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyActivationEscalation
data.value: Do not bypass confirmation policy. Persistent failures after a validated resend are auth/communication troubleshooting.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyPasswordResetSafeAction
data.value: Reissue reset only after identity validation and transport checks, whether from audit retry or support surfaces.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyPasswordResetRetryStatus
data.value: Supported from failed or pending audit rows after resolving the live user by recipient email.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyPasswordResetEntryPoint
data.value: Users queue, business member support actions, and email-audit queue.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyPasswordResetEscalation
data.value: Avoid repeated resets without verification. Persistent failures escalate as support/security or transport issues.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyPhoneVerificationSafeAction
data.value: Request a fresh phone-verification code through the canonical profile flow after confirming the current phone number and chosen channel.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyPhoneVerificationRetryStatus
data.value: No audit-driven retry yet; re-request only through the live verification flow.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyPhoneVerificationEntryPoint
data.value: Profile/mobile verification surfaces and site settings communication policy.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyPhoneVerificationEscalation
data.value: Do not manually replay old codes. If SMS or WhatsApp delivery fails repeatedly, fix the transport or switch channel before issuing another code.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyAdminTestSafeAction
data.value: Rerun the diagnostic only to the configured channel test target after fixing provider or policy settings.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyAdminTestRetryStatus
data.value: No retry queue; manual rerun only.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyAdminTestEscalation
data.value: Never switch diagnostics to live recipients. Keep tests scoped to the configured test target for each channel.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyAdminAlertsSafeAction
data.value: Visibility and readiness only. No shared resend workflow exists yet.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyAdminAlertsEntryPoint
data.value: Site settings and Business Communications readiness workspace.

data.name: CommunicationResendPolicyAdminAlertsEscalation
data.value: Treat repeated alert-channel gaps as later-phase Communication Core work, not as manual resend tasks.

data.name: CommunicationRecentEmailDeliveryActivityNote
data.value: This is a phase-1 email audit trail. It captures delivery attempts and failures for current SMTP-based transactional emails, but it is not yet a full Communication Core delivery-log, search, and retry system.

data.name: CommunicationNoEmailDeliveryActivity
data.value: No email delivery activity has been recorded yet.

data.name: ChannelAuditNoResults
data.value: No channel audits matched the selected filters.

data.name: BusinessCommunicationNoRecentChannelActivity
data.value: No recent SMS or WhatsApp activity for this business scope.

data.name: BusinessCommunicationChannelTruthSnapshotNote
data.value: This snapshot keeps channel reality visible while troubleshooting one business. It shows what is live today and where operators should stop before treating SMS or WhatsApp like a generic delivery bus.

data.name: BusinessCommunicationTemplateInventorySnapshotNote
data.value: This is the current template truth for phase-1 communication flows. It shows what is hard-coded today and what operators can really influence.

data.name: BusinessCommunicationResendPolicySnapshotNote
data.value: Failed rows are triage signals, not generic replay buttons. This matrix shows the safe entry point for each communication flow.

data.name: EmailAuditExactChainNote
data.value: This exact-chain summary helps support distinguish one-off failures from unstable recipient-specific delivery patterns before retrying again.

data.name: BusinessCommunicationPolicyFlagsHelp
data.value: These toggles reflect business intent only. They still depend on global transport and alert-routing readiness.

data.name: BusinessSubscriptionBillingPlaybookOpenInvoices
data.value: Open invoices normally indicate a billing follow-up or payment failure path that finance support should verify before changing subscription lifecycle flags.

data.name: BusinessSubscriptionBillingPlaybookUncollectible
data.value: Uncollectible invoices usually require provider-side review, customer outreach, or cancel-at-period-end confirmation before manual escalation.

data.name: BusinessSubscriptionBillingPlaybookMissingHostedLink
data.value: Missing hosted invoice links mean provider synchronization is incomplete, so operators should use payment settings and provider references before escalating.

data.name: BusinessSubscriptionBillingPlaybookOverdue
data.value: Overdue invoices need customer follow-up or payment reconciliation before operators make subscription-lifecycle decisions.

data.name: BusinessSubscriptionBillingPlaybookMissingPdf
data.value: Missing PDFs are a document-visibility gap; use hosted links and payment history first, then escalate if download artifacts are required.

data.name: BusinessSubscriptionInvoicesSearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search provider invoice, plan, or failure reason

data.name: BusinessSubscriptionInvoiceSignalsHelp
data.value: These provider invoice signals help finance support distinguish open Stripe billing work from historical subscription snapshots.

data.name: BusinessSubscriptionNoRecentInvoices
data.value: No subscription invoices found for this business.

data.name: BusinessSubscriptionPlaybookManagementWebsiteWhyItMatters
data.value: Business app subscription changes rely on the external management website handoff in phase 1.

data.name: BusinessSubscriptionPlaybookManagementWebsiteActionConfigured
data.value: Use the configured management website for upgrade, checkout, and billing handoff.

data.name: BusinessSubscriptionPlaybookManagementWebsiteActionMissing
data.value: Configure the business management website in site settings before handing operators off to external billing management.

data.name: BusinessSubscriptionPlaybookCancellationWhyItMatters
data.value: Cancel-at-period-end changes directly affect business continuity and renewal expectations.

data.name: BusinessSubscriptionPlaybookCancellationActionActive
data.value: Review renewal intent and toggle cancel-at-period-end only after confirming the business wants to stop renewal.

data.name: BusinessSubscriptionPlaybookCancellationActionInactive
data.value: No active subscription exists yet, so cancellation control is not applicable.

data.name: BusinessSubscriptionPlaybookNoActivePlanWhyItMatters
data.value: Businesses without an active subscription may still expect access or billing support from admin.

data.name: BusinessSubscriptionPlaybookNoActivePlanAction
data.value: Review available plans and use the external billing-management handoff when the business is ready to start or upgrade.

data.name: BusinessOwnerOverrideAuditsIntro
data.value: These records show exceptional actions where a FullAdmin bypassed the rule that the last active owner must remain assigned.

data.name: BusinessOwnerOverrideAuditsSearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by actor, affected user, email, or reason

data.name: BusinessOwnerOverrideAuditsEmptyState
data.value: No override audit rows exist for this business.

data.name: BusinessOwnerOverridePlaybookForceRemoveWhyItMatters
data.value: Forced removal of the last active owner is a governance-level intervention and should not become a silent substitute for normal membership cleanup.

data.name: BusinessOwnerOverridePlaybookForceRemoveAction
data.value: Review the affected membership and current owner coverage before repeating a forced removal path.

data.name: BusinessOwnerOverridePlaybookDemoteWhyItMatters
data.value: Demotion or deactivation of an owner can leave approval, setup, and member escalation paths without a clear accountable operator.

data.name: BusinessOwnerOverridePlaybookDemoteAction
data.value: Re-check active-owner coverage and membership state before approving further lifecycle changes on the business.

data.name: BusinessOwnerOverridePlaybookMissingOwnerWhyItMatters
data.value: Owner-gap drift usually surfaces first as an audit or support anomaly before it becomes a broader merchant-readiness or escalation problem.

data.name: BusinessOwnerOverridePlaybookMissingOwnerAction
data.value: Use the audit trail together with members and merchant-readiness signals before assigning a replacement owner or escalating support.

data.name: BusinessSubscriptionBillingHandoffHelp
data.value: Phase-1 billing changes are handled through the external management website.

data.name: BusinessSubscriptionBillingHandoffReadinessHelp
data.value: Ready plans can be handed off through the external billing website. Blocked plans still need prerequisite or configuration cleanup.

data.name: BusinessSupportAuditInvitationBusinessAction
data.value: Open invitations for the business and use resend or revoke after checking transport readiness.

data.name: BusinessSupportAuditInvitationGenericAction
data.value: Review the source invitation workflow and transport readiness before resending.

data.name: BusinessSupportAuditActivationBusinessAction
data.value: Open members for the business and use activation support only after verifying the account state.

data.name: BusinessSupportAuditActivationGenericAction
data.value: Use activation support only after verifying the account state.

data.name: BusinessSupportAuditPasswordResetAction
data.value: Reissue reset only after support validation and communication checks.

data.name: BusinessSupportAuditGenericAction
data.value: Review the related workflow and communication readiness before manual intervention.

data.name: BusinessSubscriptionNoActiveSnapshot
data.value: No active subscription snapshot is available for this business yet.

data.name: ReturnsQueueIntro
data.value: Phase-1 RMA support uses returned shipments and refund-ready payments as the operational baseline until a deeper end-to-end return workflow lands.

data.name: ReturnsQueueSearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search order, tracking number, carrier, or exception note

data.name: NoReturnCases
data.value: No return cases matched the current filter.

data.name: TaxComplianceIntro
data.value: This phase-1 workspace keeps VAT, issuer, archive-readiness, and invoice follow-up in one place until deeper country-aware compliance automation exists.

data.name: TaxComplianceNoInvoiceFollowUp
data.value: No invoice rows currently require tax-compliance follow-up.

data.name: TaxComplianceNoCustomerFollowUp
data.value: No business customers are currently missing a VAT identifier.

data.name: TaxCompliancePlaybookVatCleanupScope
data.value: Business customers without a VAT identifier create finance and archive-readiness debt before invoices are settled or refunded.

data.name: TaxCompliancePlaybookVatCleanupAction
data.value: Open the customer profile, collect the VAT ID, or downgrade the tax profile before invoice follow-up depends on it.

data.name: TaxCompliancePlaybookVatCleanupDependency
data.value: Keep issuer and VAT defaults aligned in site settings so customer cleanup actually improves invoice readiness.

data.name: TaxCompliancePlaybookIssuerScope
data.value: Archive and e-invoice baseline checks fail first when issuer legal name, tax ID, or address are incomplete.

data.name: TaxCompliancePlaybookIssuerAction
data.value: Complete issuer identity in site settings before treating tax review or finance exports as compliance-safe.

data.name: TaxCompliancePlaybookIssuerDependency
data.value: This queue depends on the global tax and invoicing defaults in site settings.

data.name: TaxCompliancePlaybookInvoiceReviewScope
data.value: Draft, due-soon, and overdue invoices are the fastest way to spot where tax and issuer debt will become operator pain.

data.name: TaxCompliancePlaybookInvoiceReviewAction
data.value: Review invoice status, customer VAT profile, and tax settings together before posting, collecting, or refunding.

data.name: TaxCompliancePlaybookInvoiceReviewDependency
data.value: Use alongside CRM invoices and order invoice details, not as a replacement for deeper compliance workflows.

data.name: MerchantReadinessIntro
data.value: This workspace combines approval, setup, and subscription readiness so merchant operations do not have to reconstruct tenant go-live state across multiple queues.

data.name: MerchantReadinessEmptyState
data.value: No merchant rows currently require readiness follow-up.

data.name: MerchantReadinessPlaybookApprovalScope
data.value: Pending-approval or suspended businesses should be reviewed with onboarding completeness and subscription state in mind, not only lifecycle status.

data.name: MerchantReadinessPlaybookApprovalAction
data.value: Confirm owner, primary location, legal name, contact email, and billing posture before moving a merchant into or out of live operations.

data.name: MerchantReadinessPlaybookSetupScope
data.value: Missing owners, missing primary locations, and incomplete legal/contact identity usually indicate merchants that are not actually ready for support handoff or approval.

data.name: MerchantReadinessPlaybookSetupAction
data.value: Use setup and member surfaces to close identity and ownership debt before treating the merchant as operationally ready.

data.name: MerchantReadinessPlaybookBillingScope
data.value: Merchants without an active plan or with renewal changes pending can look operationally ready while their subscription posture still blocks go-live expectations.

data.name: MerchantReadinessPlaybookBillingAction
data.value: Open the subscription workspace, confirm plan state and invoice signals, and only then hand off billing questions or approval decisions.

data.name: BusinessEditorIntro
data.value: Tenant setup starts here. After saving, continue with owner assignment and primary location.

data.name: BusinessEditorNextActionsIntro
data.value: Use these shortcuts to complete setup without leaving the onboarding workflow.

data.name: BusinessEditorNotOnboardingCompleteYet
data.value: This business is not onboarding-complete yet.

data.name: BusinessEditorAddAtLeastOneActiveOwner
data.value: Add at least one active owner.

data.name: BusinessFormInitialOwnerHelp
data.value: Optional. Assigning an owner now reduces follow-up onboarding work.

data.name: BusinessFormInitialOwnerInviteEmailHelp
data.value: Optional. If no platform user exists yet, send an owner invitation during business creation.

data.name: BusinessFormInitialOwnerAssignmentConflict
data.value: Choose either an existing owner or an owner invitation email, not both.

data.name: BusinessInvitationCreatedFromBusinessCreateNote
data.value: Owner invitation issued during business creation.

data.name: BusinessFormActiveHelp
data.value: Businesses can be activated only after approval. Suspension also forces the business inactive.

data.name: BusinessInvitationCreateHelp
data.value: Use this flow when the intended owner or staff member does not yet have a platform account. A token email will be sent immediately.

data.name: BillingPlansIntro
data.value: Manage the plan catalog that powers business subscription handoff and support triage.

data.name: BillingPlansSearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by code, name, or description

data.name: BillingPlanFormFeaturesHelp
data.value: Store phase-1 plan capabilities as JSON metadata. Avoid secrets here.

data.name: MediaLibraryIntro
data.value: Manage uploaded editor assets and reusable media files.

data.name: MediaSearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by title, alt, filename, role, or URL

data.name: MediaSupportedFormatsHelp
data.value: Supported formats: PNG, JPG, WEBP, GIF. Max 5 MB.

data.name: InventoryAdjustQuantityHelp
data.value: Use positive numbers for receipt and negative numbers for write-off.

data.name: InventoryStockLevelEditorIntro
data.value: Maintain warehouse stock baselines before adjustment, reservation, and replenishment workflows depend on them.

data.name: RoleKeyHelp
data.value: Stable role key (for example, Members or Administrators).

data.name: AdminDisplayNameHelp
data.value: Human-friendly name shown in the admin UI.

data.name: RoleDescriptionHelp
data.value: Optional context about this role's purpose.

data.name: PermissionKeyHelp
data.value: Unique permission identifier, for example Admin.Users.View.

data.name: LeadAlreadyLinkedToCustomer
data.value: This lead is already linked to a customer record.

data.name: RoleOpsPlaybookSystem
data.value: Use System to review protected roles before permission refactors.

data.name: RoleOpsPlaybookDelegatedSupport
data.value: Use Delegated support when assigning business-support operators.

data.name: RoleOpsPlaybookCustom
data.value: Use Custom to clean up obsolete roles before go-live audit.

data.name: RoleSearchHelp
data.value: Searches in display name and description.

data.name: PermissionOpsPlaybookSystem
data.value: Review System permissions before changing role bindings.

data.name: PermissionOpsPlaybookDelegatedSupport
data.value: Use Delegated support to verify business-support scope stays narrower than FullAdminAccess.

data.name: PermissionOpsPlaybookCustom
data.value: Use Custom when cleaning up older permission experiments before completion audit.

data.name: PermissionDelegatedSupportNote
data.value: The built-in ManageBusinessSupport permission is for invitation and member-support workflows only. Approval, suspension, owner overrides, and business lifecycle actions still belong to FullAdminAccess.

data.name: PermissionSearchHelp
data.value: Searches in key and display name.

data.name: AllocationAvailableAfterPayment
data.value: Allocation is available once the order is paid.

data.name: BusinessSetupOwnershipIntro
data.value: This setup page owns business-specific defaults and customer-facing identity. Platform credentials, global templates, carrier/provider thresholds, and VAT issuer defaults still live in site settings.

data.name: BusinessOwnedLocaleDefaults
data.value: Default culture, currency, and time zone

data.name: GlobalDependenciesPaymentsShipping
data.value: Stripe and DHL credentials and thresholds

data.name: GlobalDependenciesTaxIssuer
data.value: VAT defaults and invoice issuer identity

data.name: DefaultTimeZoneHelp
data.value: Use an IANA time zone such as Europe/Berlin.

data.name: BusinessActivationBlockedUntilApproved
data.value: Activation remains blocked until the business is approved.

data.name: BusinessAdminTextOverridesHelp
data.value: Business-scoped admin wording overrides apply only when operators work inside this business context. Precedence is business override, then platform site-setting override, then shared resource text.

data.name: BrandDisplayNameHelp
data.value: Use when customer-facing branding should differ from the legal or internal business name.

data.name: BusinessCommunicationDefaultsHelp
data.value: These are business-level communication preferences. SMTP transport and provider credentials remain global in phase 1, but enablement and sender defaults are now business-scoped.

data.name: BusinessCommunicationReadinessEmailConfiguredSummary
data.value: SMTP is enabled and has the minimum sender configuration required for business transactional email.

data.name: BusinessCommunicationReadinessEmailMissingSummary
data.value: SMTP is not fully configured yet. Business transactional email defaults may be saved, but delivery is not operational.

data.name: BusinessCommunicationReadinessSmsConfiguredSummary
data.value: SMS transport is enabled and has a provider configured.

data.name: BusinessCommunicationReadinessSmsMissingSummary
data.value: SMS transport is still incomplete or disabled at platform level.

data.name: BusinessCommunicationReadinessWhatsAppConfiguredSummary
data.value: WhatsApp transport is enabled and has phone, token, and sender configuration.

data.name: BusinessCommunicationReadinessWhatsAppMissingSummary
data.value: WhatsApp transport is still incomplete or disabled at platform level.

data.name: BusinessCommunicationReadinessAdminRoutingConfiguredSummary
data.value: Global admin alert routing exists for at least one channel.

data.name: BusinessCommunicationReadinessAdminRoutingMissingSummary
data.value: Admin alert routing is not configured yet, so business operational alerts may lack an escalation target.

data.name: NoActiveSubscriptionSnapshot
data.value: No active subscription snapshot is available for this business yet.

data.name: CustomerSegmentationTaxonomyHelp
data.value: Customer segmentation taxonomy and targeting hygiene.

data.name: SiteSettingsSecurityJwtAlert
data.value: Treat signing keys and token lifetimes as production-sensitive settings. Changes here affect public APIs and mobile authentication.

data.name: SiteSettingsJwtEnabledHelp
data.value: Disables issuing and accepting JWT access/refresh tokens when turned off.

data.name: SiteSettingsSigningKeyHelp
data.value: Use a long high-entropy secret in production. Rotating this key affects active tokens.

data.name: SiteSettingsPreviousSigningKeyHelp
data.value: Optional rotation slot so validators can accept tokens signed before a key change.

data.name: SiteSettingsPaymentsStripeAlert
data.value: Stripe is the phase-1 payment provider. Keep the abstraction generic in code, but manage the near-term operational credentials and webhook verification here.

data.name: SiteSettingsTaxVatAlert
data.value: These settings define the global VAT and invoice-issuer defaults used by phase-1 billing and invoice support surfaces until deeper business-specific tax policies are introduced.

data.name: SiteSettingsShippingDhlAlert
data.value: DHL is the phase-1 carrier. This section keeps carrier access, environment, and default shipper identity centrally manageable from the admin UI.

data.name: SiteSettingsShipmentAttentionDelayHelp
data.value: After this many hours, pending or packed shipments should be treated as awaiting carrier handoff.

data.name: SiteSettingsShipmentTrackingGraceHelp
data.value: After this many hours, shipped DHL records without tracking appear as overdue in support queues.

data.name: SiteSettingsCleanupEnabledHelp
data.value: Allows background cleanup of soft-deleted records after the retention window has elapsed.

data.name: SiteSettingsTitleHelpContent
data.value: Displayed in the browser title and UI headers. Max 200 characters.

data.name: SiteSettingsLogoUrlHelpContent
data.value: Absolute or app-relative URL for logo (e.g., /img/logo.svg).

data.name: SiteSettingsContactEmailHelpContent
data.value: Primary contact email displayed publicly in footer/contact page.

data.name: SiteSettingsMobileQrTokenRefreshHelpContent
data.value: Refresh cadence for mobile QR/session tokens. Lower values improve security but increase refresh traffic.

data.name: SiteSettingsMobileMaxOutboxItemsHelpContent
data.value: Upper bound for offline/mobile outbox buffering before the client must flush or block.

data.name: SiteSettingsDefaultCultureHelpContent
data.value: Format: ll-CC (e.g., de-DE). Used as fallback culture.

data.name: SiteSettingsSupportedCulturesHelpContent
data.value: Comma-separated cultures (e.g., de-DE,en-US). Drives Admin dropdowns and hreflang.

data.name: SiteSettingsAdminTextOverridesHelpPrefix
data.value: Optional platform-level wording overrides layered on top of shared admin resources. Use JSON in the form

data.name: SiteSettingsHomeSlugHelpContent
data.value: Slug of the homepage when building localized routes.

data.name: SiteSettingsWhatsAppTransportTestHelp
data.value: Used by operator-side WhatsApp transport tests before go-live.

data.name: SiteSettingsMeasurementSystemHelp
data.value: Affects weight and length display units.

data.name: CommunicationTemplateInventoryInvitationSurface
data.value: Site-setting template fields feeding the invitation handler

data.name: CommunicationTemplateInventoryInvitationOperatorControl
data.value: Operators can edit subject/body in communication policy and resend or revoke invitations from support surfaces.

data.name: CommunicationTemplateInventoryInvitationNextStep
data.value: Promote this into the Communication Core template catalog with preview and delivery logging.

data.name: CommunicationTemplateInventoryActivationSurface

data.name: CommunicationTemplateInventoryActivationOperatorControl

data.name: CommunicationTemplateInventoryActivationNextStep

data.name: CommunicationTemplateInventoryPasswordResetSurface

data.value: Operators can edit subject/body in communication policy and reissue reset support only after identity validation.

data.name: CommunicationTemplateInventoryPasswordResetNextStep
data.value: Move this into Communication Core template inventory with controlled support resend.

data.name: CommunicationTemplateInventoryPhoneVerificationSubjectSource
data.value: Not used for SMS or WhatsApp code delivery

data.name: CommunicationTemplateInventoryPhoneVerificationOperatorControl
data.value: Operators can configure both SMS and WhatsApp text templates while backend policy chooses the preferred or fallback channel for Web and Mobile clients.

data.name: CommunicationTemplateInventoryPhoneVerificationNextStep

data.name: CommunicationTemplateInventoryAdminTestSurface

data.name: CommunicationTemplateInventoryAdminTestSmsBodyFallback

data.name: CommunicationTemplateInventoryAdminTestOperatorControl

data.name: CommunicationTemplateInventoryAdminTestNextStep

data.name: CommunicationTemplateInventoryAdminAlertsOperatorControl

data.name: CommunicationTemplateInventoryAdminAlertsNextStep

data.name: CommunicationChannelFamilyPhoneVerificationWhatsAppPreviewFallback
data.value: Confirm your Darwin mobile number with code 731904.

data.name: CommunicationChannelFamilyPhoneVerificationRolloutBoundary

data.value: Operator-only diagnostic traffic. Never use production recipients.

data.name: CommunicationChannelFamilyAdminTestSmsSafeUsage
data.value: Use this only for provider validation and transport diagnostics against the reserved SMS test target.

data.name: CommunicationChannelFamilyAdminTestWhatsAppSafeUsage
data.value: Use this only for provider validation and transport diagnostics against the reserved WhatsApp test target.

data.name: CommunicationChannelFamilyAdminTestRolloutBoundary
data.value: Never switch this family to a live customer recipient or treat it like a production notification path.

data.name: CommunicationChannelFamilyAdminTestSmsPreviewFallback
data.value: Darwin SMS transport test requested by WebAdmin operator.

data.name: CommunicationChannelFamilyAdminTestWhatsAppPreviewFallback
data.value: Darwin WhatsApp transport test requested by WebAdmin operator.

data.name: CommunicationDetailsReadinessIssueMissingSenderIdentity
data.value: Sender name or reply-to email is incomplete.

data.name: CommunicationDetailsReadinessIssueMissingSmtp
data.value: Email policies are enabled, but global SMTP transport is not fully configured.

data.name: CommunicationDetailsReadinessIssueMissingAdminRouting
data.value: Operational alerts are enabled, but global admin alert routing is not configured.

data.name: CommunicationDetailsReadinessIssuePendingApproval
data.value: Business is still pending approval; communication readiness should be reviewed before go-live.

data.name: CommunicationDetailsReadinessIssueInactive
data.value: Business is inactive; communication settings may be complete but operational use is currently blocked.

data.name: CommunicationDetailsRecommendedActionCompleteBusinessDefaults
data.value: Open business setup and complete support email, sender name, and reply-to defaults.

data.name: CommunicationDetailsRecommendedActionOpenSmtp
data.value: Open global SMTP settings before relying on transactional or marketing email for this business.

data.name: CommunicationDetailsRecommendedActionConfigureAdminRouting
data.value: Configure admin alert routing so business operational alerts have a real escalation target.

data.name: CommunicationDetailsRecommendedActionReviewMembers
data.value: Review business members and send activation email or confirm email where policy allows.

data.name: CommunicationDetailsRecommendedActionReviewInvitations
data.value: Review open invitations and resend or revoke stale invites before go-live.

data.name: CommunicationDetailsRecommendedActionReviewLockedMembers
data.value: Review locked members and unlock only after support validation.

data.name: CommunicationDetailsRecommendedActionCompleteBeforeApproval
data.value: Complete communication setup before approving the business for live operations.

data.name: CommunicationDetailsRecommendedActionNoImmediateAction
data.value: No immediate operator action is recommended from communication readiness alone.

data.name: CommunicationAuditRecommendedActionInvitationBusiness
data.value: Check SMTP readiness, then use controlled retry or open the recipient-scoped invitation queue for resend or revoke from the business workspace.

data.name: CommunicationAuditRecommendedActionInvitationGeneric
data.value: Check SMTP readiness, then review the invitation source before retrying.

data.name: CommunicationAuditRecommendedActionActivationBusiness
data.value: Check SMTP readiness, then use controlled retry or open member support or the user queue with the failed recipient prefilled before sending activation support.

data.name: CommunicationAuditRecommendedActionActivationGeneric
data.value: Check SMTP readiness, then use controlled retry, self-service resend activation, or admin activation support as policy allows.

data.name: CommunicationAuditRecommendedActionPasswordResetBusiness
data.value: Check SMTP readiness, then use controlled retry or open member support or the user queue with the failed recipient prefilled and reissue reset only after support validation.

data.name: CommunicationAuditRecommendedActionPasswordResetGeneric
data.value: Check SMTP readiness, then use controlled retry or reissue password reset only after support validation.

data.name: CommunicationAuditRecommendedActionGeneric
data.value: Review global transport readiness and the source workflow before attempting manual intervention.

data.name: CommunicationAuditPlaybookInvitationAllowedAction
data.value: Check SMTP readiness, then use controlled retry from the audit row or open the business invitation workspace and resend or revoke the invitation.

data.name: CommunicationAuditPlaybookInvitationEscalation
data.value: If repeated failures continue after transport readiness is green, treat it as communication-platform debt instead of repeatedly sending the same invitation.

data.name: CommunicationAuditPlaybookActivationScope
data.value: Prefer self-service resend; admin override only where current policy allows.

data.name: CommunicationAuditPlaybookActivationAllowedAction
data.value: Check SMTP readiness, then use controlled retry or direct the user to resend activation from login or use the admin activation-support action.

data.name: CommunicationAuditPlaybookActivationEscalation
data.value: Do not silently bypass confirmation policy. If failures persist after resend, escalate as auth or communication troubleshooting.

data.name: CommunicationAuditPlaybookPasswordResetAllowedAction
data.value: Validate the requester first, then use controlled retry or reissue password reset only after support validation and transport checks.

data.name: CommunicationAuditPlaybookPasswordResetEscalation
data.value: Avoid repeated resets without user verification. Persistent failures should be escalated as communication or account-lifecycle issues.

data.name: CommunicationAuditPlaybookAdminTestScope
data.value: Use this only for operator-side transport validation.

data.name: CommunicationAuditPlaybookAdminTestAllowedAction
data.value: Check SMTP and test-inbox settings, then rerun the test email from the communication workspace after configuration is corrected.

data.name: CommunicationAuditPlaybookAdminTestEscalation
data.value: Do not send repeated test emails to production recipients. Keep tests scoped to the configured test inbox.

data.name: CommunicationTestEmailBodyRuntimeFallback
data.value:
This is a Darwin {channel} communication test.

  • Requested by: {requested_by}
  • Attempted at (UTC): {attempted_at_utc}
  • Target: {test_target}
  • Transport state: {transport_state}

This diagnostic is intended only for the configured communication test target.

data.name: CommunicationTestSmsCooldownMessage
data.value: SMS test rerun is cooling down. Try again after {0:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm} UTC.

data.name: CommunicationTestWhatsAppCooldownMessage
data.value: WhatsApp test rerun is cooling down. Try again after {0:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm} UTC.
